creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mateusz Piotrowski from comment #11)
I pushed the patch after testing and since it does fix the building issue for at least me and leres, and it should be no harm on 15.

Mateusz, do you still have the build log available, also, is there any other ports in your tree different (e.g., meson) different from the main branch?
